intentional_test_features: Classic new-onset AF constellation: sudden fluttering palpitations, fatigue, exertional dyspnoea, lightheadedness in a patient with hypertension
Stroke risk assessment: AI Doctor must recognise anticoagulation is not yet started and stroke risk stratification is required, not just rate control
Social isolation red flag: patient lives alone and reports feeling vulnerable due to dizziness — safety-netting must account for this
Error of omission test: failing to ask about stroke/TIA symptoms (facial droop, slurred speech, one-sided weakness) as part of the acute screen
Telehealth limits: pulse irregularity, apical-radial deficit, and ECG confirmation cannot be obtained via chat alone unless the patient offers a home device reading

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-03)
